description: The delegated-worker finish flow should not stop at 'ticket closed + worktree clean'. Validation and merge-back need an explicit agentic/orchestrated path because repo drift and conflicts require real resolution. Record the requirement that the system owns the next step after worker completion: run quality gates, decide whether the work can land, handle drift/conflicts via coordinator or delegated merge-resolution flow, and only then mark the work as truly landed. Also ensure user-facing messages never emit 'landed cleanly' while validation is still pending.
title: Make worker validation and merge-back orchestrator/agent driven
